#  Undo the Rejection of an Invoice in Portfolio Financials 
#####  Legacy
This information is intended for accounts with [Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/) product in Procore. Please reach out to your Procore point of contact for more information.
##  Background 
The Contract Room is a shared portal where vendors can submit change orders and invoices directly to the project team for approval throughout the duration of the project. The Invoices tab of the Contract Room is where invoices can be added, managed, and reviewed. If an invoice was marked as rejected but should instead be approved, you can undo the rejection of the invoice.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Limited' access to the project or higher.  
_Note:_ Users with 'Limited' permissions must have access to the contract associated with the invoice, or access to the relevant Invoice Room.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the relevant **Contract** **Room** by clicking the name of the cost item in the project's **Cost Tracker**.   
_Note:_ Cost items with a Contract Room are marked with a **ribbon** ![Icon Ribbon Pfcp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/e12d2de58e5c5ac13827dbf1f96f2148/0687361a917c45c1d15c3b11b0b16fac/icon-ribbon-pfcp.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon.
  2. Click the **Invoices** tab.
  3. Click the invoice that was rejected.
  4. In the 'Invoice Status' section, click **Undo**.  
  
![Undo Rejection Button](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/eba09fac4054a2095977cacb5a802326/2d1424847fa3cde30f2332911d0bd8cc/undo-rejection-button.png?fm=webp)  
  
OR  
  
Click the **vertical ellipsis**![Icon Ellipsis Vertical](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b6d0fa56ca6a66941a4032499f56aec8/2bb6315cb1db00c907bda1e2ae7a081c/icon-vertical-ellipsis.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon and select **Undo Rejection**.   
  
![Ellipsis Undo Rejection](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/f2cdfca6eb65b80d03bb8fde0e12bd06/73ecde48ce3e7ad392055d27c2131045/ellipsis-undo-rejection.png?fm=webp)
  5. Click **Undo** to confirm that the invoice should no longer be rejected.   
_Note:_ The status changes back to 'Approval Needed' and the invoice can now be approved or rejected. See [Approve or Reject an Invoice in Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/approve-or-reject-an-invoice-in-portfolio-financials).

title: Undo the Rejection of an Invoice in Portfolio Financials
description: How to undo the rejection of an invoice in the Contract Room of a Portfolio Financials project.
